title: Chen Moore and Associates ransomware incident

extortion.description: At CMA, we best describe ourselves, our approach, and our priorities with these five words: Leadership, Excellence, Philanthropy, Community and Culture. CMA embraces the history and legacy of the firm set by Dr. Ben Chen, P.E., BCEE and is empowered by the vision set by its leadership team, led by President Peter M. Moore, P.E., F.ASCE, FACEC. The firm continues to grow by striving for excellence in design, innovation, project management, and quality.
